r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Chiropractors are mysterious/scary and require commitment
emotional_amplifiers: We are to back pain, neck pain, headaches, and wellness what dentists are to teeth. We examine you, find out why you're in pain, and then get to the cause to try and make sure that your pain never returns.
You don't know what a chiropractor does - they're like dentists for your spine
specificity_elements: You don't have to pay to find out what's wrong, only to fix it!

unique_differentiators: They're like dentists for your back and you can try them for free

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Know exactly what's wrong, fix the cause, never have pain return

headline.primary_headline: AT HEALTHSOURCE, FROM NOW UNTIL JUNE 16, YOU GET A COMPLIMENTARY FULL BACK EXAM FOR NEW PATIENTS!
headline.subheadline: You don't have to pay to find out what's wrong, only to fix it!
headline.promise_compression: Free comprehensive exam to identify what's causing your pain

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: How much is a $189 exam really worth?
curiosity_architecture.resolution_promise: Complete musculoskeletal exam, functional movement check, wellness assessment, and report of findings

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Chiropractors are scary and I don't know what they do
schema_analysis.new_schema: Get a free exam to find out what's wrong with zero commitment
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: Free exam removes risk + dentist analogy explains role + family-like care promise

headline.vsl_adaptation: Your back pain has a cause. And that cause has a solution. But you can't fix what you don't know. That's why HealthSource is offering a complete $189 exam absolutely free...

lead.opening_verbatim: Summer is just around the corner! And, to celebrate as a new patient at Health Source, from now until June 16, you don't have to pay to find out what's wrong, only to fix it!
lead.transition_to_body: It's our Gift to you and every member of your family!

key_sections.content_verbatim: Your NO COST new patient exam includes a comprehensive musculoskeletal and motion exam, functional movement check, wellness assessment, and a complete report of findings...plus, more.

Don't worry: maybe you're not exactly sure what a chiropractor is or what we do. We are to back pain, neck pain, headaches, and wellness what dentists are to teeth. We examine you, find out why you're in pain, and then get to the cause to try and make sure that your pain never returns.
Oh, and if you're a 'White-Knuckle Flyer,' a little unsure of what to expect or what we do, you'll discover that you can actually relax and not worry about a thing here at Health Source.
we'll treat you like a member of our own family and provide you with only our very best service.

narrative_flow.bonus_offer: First 20 new patients who bring in ad get FREE progressive rehab massage

offer.offer: FREE full back exam for new patients

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: 4-star for effective local lead generation template
notable_elements: The dentist analogy is simple and effective
Named staff (Sian, Brittany) personalizes the offer
extraction_notes.key_insight: The dentist analogy instantly demystifies chiropractic care - people understand dentists, so positioning as 'dentists for your back' makes the unfamiliar familiar
